formulations.formulation_label: Permeation of Ibuprofen Ion-Pairs through Membranes
formulations.evidence_snippet: Both Ibuprofen ion-pairs penetrated significantly better than the sodium salt. title: The curry spice curcumin reduces oxidative damage and amyloid pathology in an Alzheimer transgenic mouse.

formulations.evidence_snippet: Low doses of curcumin significantly lowered oxidized proteins.... with low-dose curcumin treatment, the astrocytic marker GFAP was reduced, and insoluble Aβ (Aβ42), soluble Aβ, and plaque burden were significantly decreased by 43–50%.

formulations.evidence_snippet: High-dose curcumin had a significantly lower level of oxidized proteins (46.3%) compared with untreated animals.
formulations.notes: High doses did not alter the level of insoluble Aβ but were effective in oxidative protein reduction.
